app.title: How Poor I am
app.subtitle: Discover your true purchasing power anywhere in the world
app.description: Compare your salary with the cost of living in different countries and regions

input.salaryTooltip: Your annual salary before taxes. Use gross for more accurate comparisons.
input.currencyTooltip: The currency you currently receive your salary in.
input.regionTooltip: More specific location within the country.
input.industryTooltip: Salary multipliers vary by industry. Tech usually has higher purchasing power.
input.calculateTooltip: See how your salary compares worldwide!

netSalary.subtitleGross: From your GROSS salary to NET

taxCompare.title: Tax Comparison
taxCompare.subtitle: How much more or less in taxes would you pay?
taxCompare.insightBetter: you'd pay less taxes and have more net income.
taxCompare.insightWorse: you'd pay more taxes. Consider negotiating a higher salary to compensate.
taxCompare.insightSimilar: Both countries have similar tax burden.

relocation.title: Relocation Costs
relocation.subtitle: How much do you need to move to

relocation.advice2: Consider more affordable cities within the country
relocation.advice3: The buffer fund covers initial unexpected expenses

savings.subtitle: How much you could save in
savings.goalsTimeline: Goals and time to reach them
savings.insightGood: Excellent! With this savings rate you could accumulate a significant fund quickly.
savings.insightModerate: Moderate savings. Consider adjusting your lifestyle to maximize savings.
savings.insightLow: Low savings. Explore opportunities to increase income or reduce expenses.

lifestyle.subtitle: What kind of life can you afford in

benefits.subtitle: Calculate your total compensation in
benefits.insightGood: Excellent benefits package! Consider the full package when negotiating.
benefits.insightModerate: Average benefits package. Consider negotiating more benefits.
benefits.insightLow: Below average benefits. Focus on negotiating base salary or additional benefits.

wizard.title: Salary Wizard
wizard.subtitle: Find out how much you should ask for in 4 steps
wizard.step2: How much do you earn now?

oneclick.title: Quick Comparison
oneclick.subtitle: Compare instantly between countries
oneclick.adviceGood: Excellent opportunity! Your purchasing power would increase significantly.
oneclick.adviceSimilar: Similar standard of living. Consider other factors like quality of life.
oneclick.adviceBad: Cost of living is significantly higher. You'd need a higher salary.

remote.subtitle: Compare your local salary vs remote work for international company

remote.consideration3: Value benefits: health insurance, vacation, equity
remote.consideration4: Job stability may vary vs local work

family.title: Family Costs
family.subtitle: Real cost of raising children in {country}
family.insightExpensive: Family cost is significant. Consider available tax benefits.
family.insightModerate: Moderate cost. Government benefits can significantly reduce net cost.
family.insightAffordable: Relatively affordable for the region. Take advantage of available benefits.

city.subtitle: Compare cities in {country}

rentVsBuy.title: Rent vs Buy Analyzer
rentVsBuy.subtitle: Should you rent or buy in {country}?
rentVsBuy.selectCountry: Select a country to analyze options
rentVsBuy.breakEvenBuy: Buying breaks even after {years} years - buy if staying longer
rentVsBuy.breakEvenRent: Renting is more cost-effective for {years} years
rentVsBuy.highGrowth: Strong price appreciation - buying may be better for long-term gains
rentVsBuy.coolingMarket: Market is cooling - consider renting and waiting
rentVsBuy.highRatio: High price-to-rent ratio favors renting in the short term

inflation.title: Inflation Adjusted Salary
inflation.subtitle: How inflation affects your purchasing power in {country}
inflation.selectCountry: Select a country to see inflation projections
inflation.highInflation: High inflation significantly erodes purchasing power over time
inflation.housingConcern: Housing costs are rising faster than overall inflation - consider this in relocation decisions
inflation.improving: Inflation is expected to moderate in the coming years
inflation.advice: To maintain your standard of life, aim for salary increases above the inflation rate

career.subtitle: Project your salary growth in {country}

career.highGrowth: Your industry has strong growth potential - consider negotiating aggressively
career.moderateGrowth: Moderate growth expected - consider upskilling to accelerate advancement
career.slowPromotions: Slower promotion cycles - patience and consistency are key
career.advice: Remember: salary growth depends on performance, market conditions, and negotiation skills

emergency.priority: Building an emergency fund should be your top financial priority
emergency.excellent: Excellent! You have a solid emergency fund in place
emergency.invest: Keep your emergency fund in a high-yield savings account for easy access

colTrends.highIncrease: Cost of living has increased significantly in recent years

workLife.worse: The destination country has lower work-life balance than your current country
